description: Registry of conditional named gates in Section 10. Governs the mechanical path for promoting lane-only gates to merge-blocking. Enforced by CI gate gate-promotion-registry (Build Route 10.7). Scope: Section 10 only — Foundation gates (Sections 1-9) are permanently merge-blocking and do not participate in the promotion lifecycle.
promotion_pr_requirements: Gate moved from lane_checks.json to required_checks.json
gate_promotion_registry.json entry updated: status -> merge-blocking, promoted-by -> PR number

gates.name: weweb-drift
gates.promotion_trigger: WeWeb becomes an actively maintained production surface — first real user traffic or committed WeWeb workflow artifacts in repo

gates.name: frontend-contract-guard
gates.promotion_trigger: Explicit promotion PR per Build Route 10.20

gates.name: surface-enumeration
gates.promotion_trigger: Explicit promotion PR per Build Route 10.21
